text:
Think about how you completed the flow-chart in exercise 2 and answer the questions.
1 Were the words in the recording exactly the same as the words in the flow-chart?
2 Was there extra information in the listening which you didn't need to use and which might have led you to give the wrong answer?

Read the opinions below on being famous and complete these tasks:
Underline the key words in each sentence.
Read the word before and after the gap.
Make a note of the possible grammatical forms of the missing word,
i.e. adjective, noun, verb, etc.
Try to guess the missing word, or some possible words.
: I wouldn't like to be famous. I would hate people to 1

explanation: در اینجا به معنی شناختن چهره یک فرد مشهور در مکان‌های عمومی است.

text: me all the time. You would always be followed by 2

explanation: اشاره به پاپاراتزی‌ها و افرادی دارد که برای رسانه‌ها خبر تهیه می‌کنند.

text: and never able to have a private life. Being followed on a good day, when you've been to the hairdresser and are wearing your best jeans, is perhaps 3

explanation: صفت؛ به معنای چیزی که می‌توان آن را تحمل کرد یا پذیرفت.

text: , but can you imagine how it would make you feel on a bad day?
: I would love to be famous. I would adore all the 4

explanation: در اینجا به معنی مورد توجه عموم و رسانه‌ها قرار گرفتن است.

text: and the special treatment. Everywhere I went, people would know my name and I wouldn't need to 5

explanation: به عنوان فعل به معنی منتظر ماندن در صف (مثلاً برای ورود به جایی) است.

text: any more. The best part, though, would be meeting other famous people. I can imagine that would be so 6

explanation: صفتی برای توصیف یک تجربه یا موقعیت مهیج.
در اینجا برای توصیف مالکیت شخصی (قایق تفریحی خصوصی) به کار رفته است.
فعل؛ رفتن به جایی برای دیدن کسی یا مکانی.

text:
their mansions.

Compare your answers with a partner. Were some of your guesses

In the exam it is unlikely that you will be able to guess the actual missing word. However, it will help you a lot if you think about the type of word you are listening for.
the same?
